en.desc: Pour one bottle of SUPREP (6 oz) into the mixing container that comes with the kit. Add cool drinking water to the 12-oz fill line. Mix, then drink the entire 12 oz. en.desc: Low-residue (“white”) diet for the 3 days before the procedure, through lunch the day before. After 2:00 PM the day before, switch to clear liquids only — no dairy. Sample meals are on your instructions page.
en.titleDetailed: Start low-residue diet — EGD + colonoscopy prep

en.desc: MiraLAX: 8 capfuls (5 oz or 136 g) — one 238 g bottle is enough. Clear Gatorade (no red or purple): 32 oz (~950 mL). Dulcolax 5 mg tablets: 1. Enough for the big prep plus the rescue plan.
en.titleDetailed: Buy prep supplies — MiraLAX, Gatorade, Dulcolax

en.desc: After 2:00 PM — clear liquids only. No solid food, no dairy. OK: water, apple juice, white grape juice, lemonade, clear soda, clear broth, popsicles, plain Jell-O. Nothing red or purple.
en.titleDetailed: Clear liquids only begins — EGD + colonoscopy prep

en.desc: Give Dulcolax tablets — 1 tablet (5 mg) — with a sip of water.
en.titleDetailed: Give Dulcolax — 1 tablet (5 mg)

en.desc: Start the MiraLAX solution — 5 capfuls (~80 g) of MiraLAX in 20 oz (~600 mL) of Gatorade — from the fridge. Have your child drink 3 oz (~90 mL) every 30 minutes until finished.
en.titleDetailed: Start the MiraLAX drink

en.desc: Stop all clear liquids 3 hours before the procedure. After this, nothing to eat or drink — this keeps your child safe during anesthesia.
en.titleDetailed: Stop all clear liquids (3 hours before procedure)

en.desc: Low-residue (“white”) diet for the 3 days before the procedure, through lunch the day before. After 2:00 PM the day before, switch to clear liquids only — no dairy. Sample meals are on your instructions page.
en.titleDetailed: Start low-residue diet — EGD + colonoscopy prep

en.desc: 1 SUPREP kit (2 bottles of 6 oz concentrate + mixing container — prescription). Plus plenty of clear liquids, including an electrolyte drink. Nothing red or purple.
en.titleDetailed: Buy prep supplies — SUPREP kit + clear liquids

en.desc: Clear liquids only all day — no solid food, no dairy. OK: water, apple juice, white grape juice, lemonade, clear soda, clear broth, popsicles, plain Jell-O. Nothing red or purple.
en.titleDetailed: Clear liquids only all day — EGD + colonoscopy prep

en.desc: Pour one bottle of SUPREP (6 oz) into the mixing container that comes with the kit. Add cool drinking water to the 12-oz fill line. Mix, then drink the entire 12 oz. Over the next hour, drink 2 more containers of plain water filled to the 12-oz line (24 oz total). Cold water and a straw help with the salty taste.
en.titleDetailed: SUPREP Dose 1 — mix and drink during this window

en.desc: Take 10–12 hours after Dose 1 and at least 5 hours before the procedure: mix the second bottle of SUPREP to the 12-oz fill line, drink it all, then 2 more containers of plain water (24 oz total) over the next hour. Finish all SUPREP and required water at least 3 hours before the procedure.
en.titleDetailed: SUPREP Dose 2 — 10–12 hours after Dose 1

en.desc: Pour one bottle of SUPREP (6 oz) into the mixing container that comes with the kit. Add cool drinking water to the 12-oz fill line. Mix, then drink the entire 12 oz. Over the next hour, drink 2 more containers of plain water filled to the 12-oz line (24 oz total). Cold water and a straw help with the salty taste.

en.desc: Take 10–12 hours after Dose 1 and at least 5 hours before the procedure: mix the second bottle of SUPREP to the 12-oz fill line, drink it all, then 2 more containers of plain water (24 oz total) over the next hour. Finish all SUPREP and required water at least 2 hours before the procedure.
en.titleDetailed: SUPREP Dose 2 — 10–12 hours after Dose 1
